qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent CGPA, Publications in Q1 journals as first author, Teaching/research/industry experience for Grade-I
qualification.details: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent CGPA. 60% marks or equivalent CGPA at the preceding degree in the appropriate branch with excellent academic record. Minimum 4 publications as first author in Q1 journals (3 for CDS) for Gr.II or Minimum 6 publications as first author in Q1 journals (4 for DMS and CDS) for Gr.I. At least 3 years teaching/research/industry experience (excluding PhD) for Gr.I.

salary_details.details: Academic Pay Level 10 (₹70,900) for Gr.II Academic Pay Level 12 (₹1,01,500) for Gr.I

selection_process: Screening by Department Departmental Faculty Advisory Committee (DFAC) shortlisting Presentation and interaction Institute Faculty Advisory Committee (IFAC) review Selection Committee
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IISER Kolkata Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IISER Kolkata to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IISER Kolkata Assistant Professor Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Assistant Professor post at IISER Kolkata?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Assistant Professor positions at IISER Kolkata is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 27 vacancies announced for the Assistant Professor positions at IISER Kolkata.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification is a Ph.D. with first class or equivalent CGPA, along with specific publication and experience requirements depending on the Grade.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: No, the official notification states that there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: The salary will be in Academic Pay Level 10 (₹70,900) for Grade II or Academic Pay Level 12 (₹1,01,500) for Grade I.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Assistant Professor role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves screening by the department, shortlisting by DFAC, presentation and interaction, review by IFAC, and final selection by the Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates with industry experience apply for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with relevant industry experience are eligible, especially for Grade I positions where at least 3 years of experience is required.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article for easy access.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of IISER Kolkata?
faq.answer: The official website of IISER Kolkata is www.iiserkol.ac.in, which is also provided in the "Important Links" section.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations for reserved categories?
faq.answer: While no specific age limits are mentioned, age relaxation will be provided as per the prevailing government rules for reserved categories.
